name: X: Reply To Post
description: Open one X post URL in a fresh tab, draft a reply in the inline composer, pause for human approval, then send. Use when you want to publicly reply to a specific post. Do not use for DMs (use `x_reply_dm_thread` or `x_send_dm`) or top-level posts (`x_create_post`).

browser_automation.description: Opens the post in a fresh tab, activates the inline reply textbox with a trusted click, types the reply, asserts Reply is enabled, pauses at the review gate, and sends on continue.

sequences.name: x_reply_post
sequences.description: Open post -> activate inline reply -> type reply -> verify enabled -> pause for review -> send.

required_variables.name: post_url
required_variables.description: Full X post URL to reply to

steps.name: Open the post in a fresh tab
Allow the post page to settle
Wait for the inline reply textbox on the post page
Activate the inline reply textbox with a trusted click
Allow the inline reply caret to settle
Confirm the reply is accepted by the composer
Pause for review before sending the reply
steps.message: Reply draft is ready. Click Continue only if you want to send it.
steps.instructions: If you do not want to send this reply, stop the workflow instead of waiting for the timeout.

steps.name: Allow the reply send to settle
Read the final page state
steps.script: const normalize = (value) => (value || '').replace(/\u00a0/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const composer = document.querySelector("div[data-testid='tweetTextarea_0'], div[role='textbox'][data-testid='tweetTextarea_0'], div[role='textbox'][contenteditable='true']"); const button = document.querySelector("button[data-testid='tweetButton'], button[data-testid='tweetButtonInline']"); return { url: location.href, composer_text: composer ? normalize(composer.textContent || '') : null, reply_button_present: !!button, reply_button_disabled: button ? (!!button.getAttribute('disabled') || button.getAttribute('aria-disabled') === 'true') : null };

help.summary: Reply to one X post after human approval at an in-page review gate.

parameters.name: post_url
parameters.description: Full X post URL to reply to.

examples.command: rzn-browser run x reply-post --param post_url="https://x.com/elonmusk/status/2046981493197586714" --param reply_text="I love your content, cheers"
examples.description: Draft and send a reply after confirming at the review gate.

notes: Mutating. Pauses at the in-page review gate with approval_mode=ask_user.
Uses a trusted CDP click on the composer so X's rich-text editor actually receives the input.
Opens a fresh tab — safe for parallel runs.
